channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: 'Taiwan Travelogue' wins the 2026 International Booker Prize
item.description: The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.
item.content:encoded:
The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.

(Image credit: Adrian Dennis)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: Tomeka Reid expands the possibilities of jazz avant garde on 'Dance! Skip! Hop!'
item.description: Reid's quartet makes music that seems inspired by a variety of sources, ranging from modern dance to children's games. Her latest album is one of her most compelling.
item.content:encoded: Reid's quartet makes music that seems inspired by a variety of sources, ranging from modern dance to children's games. Her latest album is one of her most compelling.
item.dc:creator: Martin Johnson

item.title: In the face of devastating loss, Jesmyn Ward holds onto 'respair'
item.description: Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.
item.content:encoded:
Ward learned the term "respair" — meaning the recovery of hope after despair — during the pandemic. Her new book On Witness and Respair is an essay collection on grief, motherhood and survival.

(Image credit: Beowulf Sheehan)
item.dc:creator: Tonya Mosley

item.title: 15 books our critics can't wait for this summer
item.description: A gothic horror tale, a creepy science-fiction romp, a sweeping romance, an intergenerational saga, a book about birds — here are the fiction and nonfiction our critics are most looking forward to.
item.content:encoded: A gothic horror tale, a creepy science-fiction romp, a sweeping romance, an intergenerational saga, a book about birds — here are the fiction and nonfiction our critics are most looking forward to.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Collins Sullivan

item.title: Colbert's last episodes: What happened on 'The Late Show' last night
item.description: Stephen Colbert spent Tuesday night with his old friend Jon Stewart and filmmaker Steven Spielberg, delivering sharp banter and lots of jokes about President Trump.
item.content:encoded:
The Late Show with Stephen Colbert. The program's final episode will air Thursday night.
'/>

Stephen Colbert spent Tuesday night with his old friend Jon Stewart and filmmaker Steven Spielberg, delivering sharp banter and lots of jokes about President Trump.

(Image credit: Scott Kowalchyk)
item.dc:creator: Eric Deggans

item.title: 'SNL' just wrapped its 51st season: It's time to cruelly rank its musical guests
item.description: The latest season of Saturday Night Live felt transitional in many ways, but it was full of blockbuster pop stars, up-and-coming bands and musical legends. We ranked them from worst to best.
item.content:encoded:
The latest season of Saturday Night Live felt transitional in many ways, but it was full of blockbuster pop stars, up-and-coming bands and musical legends. We ranked them from worst to best.

(Image credit: Will Heath)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Thompson

item.title: Son of radicals, Zayd Ayers Dohrn details a childhood underground and on the run
item.description: Dohrn's parents, Bill Ayers and Bernardine Dohrn, helped found the the Weather Underground. "I knew that the FBI was chasing us," he says. His memoir is Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young.
item.content:encoded:
Dohrn's parents, Bill Ayers and Bernardine Dohrn, helped found the the Weather Underground. "I knew that the FBI was chasing us," he says. His memoir is Dangerous, Dirty, Violent, and Young.

(Image credit: David Handschuh)
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: For 20 years, Stephen Colbert distinguished truth from truthiness
item.description: The Late Show with Stephen Colbert ends on Thursday. Here's how he has evolved to meet the moment.
item.content:encoded:
The Colbert Report in December 2014.'/>

The Late Show with Stephen Colbert ends on Thursday. Here's how he has evolved to meet the moment.

(Image credit: Andrew Harrer)
item.dc:creator: Eric Deggans

item.title: Harrison Ford gets an honorary doctorate and addresses the class of 2026
item.description: Harrison Ford now has an honorary doctorate from Arizona State University, and his speech was cheered by the ASU Class of 2026.
item.content:encoded: Harrison Ford now has an honorary doctorate from Arizona State University, and his speech was cheered by the ASU Class of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Ayesha Rascoe

item.title: Sunday Puzzle: Between the lines
item.description: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Erin Kealiher and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Ayesha Rascoe plays the puzzle with WAMU listener Erin Kealiher and Weekend Edition Puzzlemaster Will Shortz.
item.dc:creator: Will Shortz
